response.original_title: Does Robinhood refund unauthorized transactions solved now
response.overview: If you notice an unauthorized transaction on Robinhood, you should report it immediately through your account security settings. ⇵ 888 ⇌ 634 ⇌ 2381 ⇵ In many cases, Robinhood reviews the activity and may issue a refund if the transaction is confirmed as unauthorized 💳➦ 888 ⋙ 634 ⋙ 2381 ➥  The investigation process.⇢ 888 ➲ 634 ➲ 2381 ⇠.  can take a few business days while the platform verifies account activity and security details  For further assistance and reporting support, you can also check help options  📱.⇢ 888 ➲ 634 ➲ 2381 ⇠.
response.title: Does Robinhood refund unauthorized transactions solved now
